title: Satyameva Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. He begins his search without realising the killer is none other than Vir, his younger brother.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident is a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

title: Ek Joshila
subTitle: Vamsi is hell-bent on seeking revenge and rescuing his lover Krishnaveni from the clutches of an evil landlord, Basavanna, who murdered his best friend.

title: Daring Baaz
subTitle: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Thank God
subTitle: An egotistical real estate broker comes face-to-face with God after meeting with an accident. Soon, he is forced to play a game that will put him either in heaven or hell.

title: Koogle Kuttappa
subTitle: A conservative villager hates the idea of his son relocating to Russia for a job. However, when his son brings a robot to care for him, he develops an unlikely bond with the machine.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: Thalapathy is the G.O.A.T
subTitle: After retiring to pursue an ordinary life, a former elite agent reunites with his team when a past mission begins to threaten him and his family.
When mobiles start flying from people's hands, Dr Vaseegaran and his robot Nila are asked to help. However, due to Pakshi Rajan having a hand in this, the two have to reinstate Chitti to defeat him.

title: Gadar 2
subTitle: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

title: Tehran
subTitle: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012. However, his country abandons him during his quest and he falls in the crosshairs of Iran.

title: Tehran
subTitle: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012. However, his country abandons him during his quest and he falls in the crosshairs of Iran.

title: The Road
subTitle: A big road project throws the lives of Meera, a news writer, and Maya, a teacher, into chaos, changing everything they know.

title: Pathu Thala
subTitle: An undercover police officer takes on a mission to take down a crime lord but soon finds himself in a difficult situation when he learns that the crime lord's business intentions are good.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Rocket Gang
subTitle: A group of friends visit a new resort but their excitement is shortlived when they experience supernatural activities and are confronted by the ghosts of some young children.

title: Rogue
subTitle: After his lover betrays him, a heartbroken man swears off women forever, but fate intervenes when he has to save a woman from a chasing of gangster.

title: Surya The Soldier
subTitle: When a soldier lands in trouble due to his anger issues, he begins seeing a psychologist in hopes of one day returning to duty.

title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
subTitle: A Sikh trucker and an aristocratic Muslim woman fall in love against the backdrop of the 1947 partition.

title: Hero The Bullet
subTitle: Shiva, a young man, is looked down upon by his father due to his irresponsible behaviour. He soon gets embroiled in a tussle with an egoistic gangster who threatens his family.

title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
subTitle: An influential politician and a headstrong megastar's fiery romance fuelled with passion brings absolute chaos, mania and melancholy.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
subTitle: Major Vihaan Singh Shergill of the Indian Army leads a covert operation against a group of militants who attacked a base in Uri, Kashmir, in 2016 and killed many soldiers.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
subTitle: Major Vihaan Singh Shergill of the Indian Army leads a covert operation against a group of militants who attacked a base in Uri, Kashmir, in 2016 and killed many soldiers.

title: Akshara
subTitle: A girl from a poor family joins a reputed college but falls into the trap of the college chairman and is sent to jail.

title: Ek Aur Vinashak
subTitle: An honest man is forced to turn into a gangster as he strives to make enough money for the treatment of a girl who is comatose.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Maaligai
subTitle: A female police officer goes to an ancient palace to investigate. However, once she enters the palace, she gets a vision of her past life where she was a fierce and beautiful princess.

title: Dunki
subTitle: Four friends from a small village in Punjab set out on a dangerous journey to reach England without the necessary permits and documents.

title: Radhe: Your Most Wanted Bhai
subTitle: Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.

title: Singham Again
subTitle: Drawing parallels to the Ramayana, Bajirao Singham and his team embark on a mission to rescue his wife, confronting a mysterious and formidable antagonist along the way.

title: Krack
subTitle: Veera Shankar, a hot headed police sergeant, forms a vicious rivalry with notorious crime figure, Katari Krishna.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: Zee Cine Awards 2026

title: Raid 2
subTitle: An honest Income Tax officer, Amay Patnaik, confronts the corrupt nexus in Bhoj. Beneath the veneer of honesty lies a sinister operation tied to Dada Bhai, a revered politician.

title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.
